overview.description: repo-manual turns a codebase into a committed, AI-written / human-read orientation manual: scan the source into a structural index, group files into systems, write Markdown pages an orchestrator (the agent running the tool) narrates, and track freshness so the manual never quietly rots. No bundled LLM — the agent IS the narrator.

systems.title: ① Data Model & Config
systems.description: The vocabulary everything speaks: the structural index IR (files/symbols/edges), the manual structure (sections/pages), the GenerationTask brief, and the committed config. Tolerant parsing so older artifacts degrade gracefully.

systems.title: ② Scanning — the grounding
systems.description: Turn source into a deterministic RepoIndex: an ast analyzer behind a pluggable LanguageAnalyzer protocol (symbols, internal imports, resolved-only call edges — never guessed), plus content hashing. This is the grounding the narrative is held to.

systems.title: ③ Planning & Grouping
systems.description: Carve the index into the pages a human reads — AI systems from structure.json, or a deterministic package seed — and assemble each page's GenerationTask (files + symbol outline + deps).

systems.title: ④ Store & Freshness — the wedge
systems.description: Write (and safely re-write) the committed .repo-manual/ folder: per-page Markdown with fenced generated + human regions, content-preserving merge, and content-hash drift detection. Narrative and human notes survive regeneration; only stale pages are rewritten.

systems.title: ⑤ Verification — the trust gate
systems.description: Check, deterministically and with no LLM, that every source citation in a narrated page resolves to a real file and an in-bounds line range. Catches the fabricated or drifted references that sink AI doc tools.

systems.title: ⑥ CLI
systems.description: The command surface that wires the systems into the workflow: scan / structure / generate / plan / brief / ingest / stale / verify / hook / serve. The orchestration seam lives here.

systems.title: ⑦ Viewer
systems.description: A no-build, browser-based view of the committed manual: a single static page (CDN marked + mermaid + cytoscape) over the JSON the tool already emits — sidebar nav, rendered pages, function drill-down, and an interactive import/call graph with blast-radius highlighting.
